college.name: Kingston Engineering College
college.address: Chittoor Main Road, Vellore, Tamil Nadu – 632 059
college.about: Kingston Engineering College is an autonomous institution approved by AICTE and affiliated to Anna University. We have achieved NAAC 'A' grade and are committed to providing world-class education in engineering and technology.

intents.title: Hello! Welcome to Kingston 👋
content_points: I'm your Kingston Engineering College assistant, available 24/7!
I can help with: Admissions • Fees • Placements • Departments • Facilities • Scholarships • Hostel • Academics
Just ask me anything about Kingston! What would you like to know?

intents.title: Admission at Kingston 🎓
content_points: 📌 B.E. / B.Tech: 12th pass with Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics
📌 B.Arch: 12th pass with 50% aggregate + Maths
📌 M.Tech: B.E./B.Tech degree in relevant branch (2 years)
📌 MBA: Any graduation + valid CAT/MAT score (2 years)
✅ B.E. admissions: Through TNEA counselling (Anna University)
✅ Direct Admission: Available for NRI, management quota & international students
💡 Pro Tip: Apply early! Seats fill quickly. Contact admission cell for guidance.

intents.title: Fee Structure 💰
content_points: 📍 B.E. / B.Tech: ₹1,60,000 per annum
📍 B.Arch: ₹1,80,000 per annum
📍 M.Tech: ₹1,50,000 per annum
📍 MBA: ₹2,00,000 per annum
🏠 Hostel (Boys & Girls): ₹1,00,000 per annum (optional, all facilities included)
🚌 Transportation: ₹50,000–₹1,00,000 per annum (varies by distance)
💡 Financial Support: Scholarships for SC/ST/BC/MBC • Merit-based support • Educational loans • Fee refund policy available

intents.title: Placements at Kingston 📊
content_points: ✨ Placement Rate: 95%+ consistently across all batches
💰 Highest Package: ₹25 LPA
📈 Average Package: ₹6.5 LPA
🏢 Top Recruiters: TCS • Infosys • Wipro • HCL • Amazon • Microsoft • Zoho • Cognizant • Accenture • Capgemini
🎯 What We Offer: Dedicated Placement & Training Cell • On-campus recruitment drives • Mock interviews • Aptitude coaching • Industry internships • Higher education guidance
💼 Latest: 500+ students placed in last batch • Average 3-4 offers per student

intents.title: Scholarships & Financial Aid 🏆
content_points: 🎓 Merit Scholarships: Top 10% students get partial/full tuition waiver
📋 Reservation Category: SC/ST/BC/MBC students eligible for govt scholarships
💰 BPL Students: Special financial support & fee concessions available
🌍 NRI/International: Special rates & payment plans available
🏥 Special Schemes: Sports scholars • Differently-abled students • Girl child education
📚 Higher Education: Scholarship support for postgraduate studies
⚡ How to Apply: Contact admission office for details. Scholarships awarded during admission.

intents.title: Contact Kingston 📞
content_points: 📧 Email: admission@kingston.ac.in | info@kingston.ac.in
📱 Admission Helpline: +91-75400-37999 (Available 9 AM – 6 PM IST, Mon–Sat)
📍 Address: Chittoor Main Road, Vellore, Tamil Nadu – 632 059
🕐 Office Hours: Monday–Saturday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM IST | Closed Sundays & Public Holidays
💻 Visit Us: www.kingston.ac.in | Social: Facebook, LinkedIn, Instagram

intents.title: Our Departments & Programs 🏫
content_points: 🎓 Undergraduate Programs:
• B.E. Computer Science & Engineering (CSE)
• B.E. Information Technology (IT)
• B.E. Electronics & Communication (ECE)
• B.E. Mechanical Engineering
• B.E. Civil Engineering
• B.Arch Architecture (5 years)
🚀 Specialized UG Programs: AI & ML • AI & Data Science • Computer Science & Business Systems
📚 Postgraduate: M.Tech (4 specializations) • MBA

intents.title: Campus Facilities & Amenities 🏢
content_points: 🏫 Academic: State-of-the-art labs • Modern classrooms • Digital library • 24/7 WiFi • Auditorium with 2000 capacity
🏠 Hostel: Boys & Girls hostels • Spacious rooms • Common areas • Recreational facilities • Mess with nutritious meals
📚 Library: 50,000+ books • Online databases • Quiet study zones • Student lounge
⚽ Sports: Basketball & volleyball courts • Cricket ground • Badminton hall • Gym with modern equipment
🍽️ Dining: Multi-cuisine canteen • Hygienic food preparation • Dietary preferences respected
🏥 Health: On-campus medical clinic • Doctor on call • Emergency services available

intents.title: Hostel & Accommodation 🏠
content_points: ✨ Modern Facilities: 2-3 bed rooms • Attached washrooms • Hot/cold water • 24/7 electricity & WiFi
💰 Cost: ₹1,00,000 per annum (includes mess, electricity, maintenance)
🍽️ Mess: Nutritious meals • Breakfast, lunch, dinner • Special dietary options available
🎮 Recreation: TV lounge • Gaming area • Common room • Sports facilities
🔒 Security: CCTV monitoring • Trained staff • Regular maintenance • Emergency support 24/7
📋 Rules: Peaceful environment • No ragging policy • Respect for diverse backgrounds

intents.title: Library & Learning Resources 📚
content_points: 📖 Collection: 50,000+ books • Journals & magazines • Rare collections • Audio-visual materials
💻 Digital Access: Online databases • E-books • Journals • Research papers • 24/7 remote access
🏢 Spaces: Reading halls • Study zones • Quiet areas • Collaborative spaces • Computer lab
👥 Services: Reference support • Document delivery • Literature search • Research guidance
⏰ Hours: Monday–Saturday 8 AM – 6 PM | Sunday 10 AM – 4 PM

intents.title: Academic Programs & Schedule 📖
content_points: 📅 Academic Calendar: Semesters follow Anna University guidelines • Regular updates on portal
📚 Curriculum: Updated regularly • Industry-relevant • Practical focus • Internship requirements
👨‍🎓 Faculty: PhD-qualified instructors • Industry experts • Mentorship programs
✍️ Assessment: Continuous evaluation • Mid-terms • End-semester exams • Project work • Industrial training
🎯 Learning: Classroom teaching • Lab experiments • Project-based learning • Seminar presentations
